what: Score and rank matched entries by relevance
why: Present the most relevant results first by computing relevance scores based on match quality

output.console: Ranked entry list with relevance scores

success_handling.criteria: Matched entries are scored based on filter match quality, tag overlap, and text relevance, then sorted by score descending

error_handling.criteria: Relevance scoring algorithm encounters an error (e.g., invalid entry data)
error_handling.action: Fall back to unsorted results, log warning

event.message: Relevance scoring failed, returning unsorted results: {error}

decisions.outcome: Use unsorted match results, proceed to semantic-search step
